name: Coriander Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
----------------------SESAME DRESSING----------------------
1. Combine 1 tablespoon dry mustard with water.
2. Add sesame oil, salad oil, soy sauce, sugar, lemon juice, and Chinese five-spice powder to the mustard-water mixture.
3. Blend until homogeneous.
Optional: Allow the dressing to sit at room temperature overnight for a well-blended mixture (freshly made tastes fine as well).
1. Cut chicken into strips. Optionally, soak in soy sauce for one hour.
2. Fry chicken in butter and garlic over low heat until browned.
3. Reduce heat and simmer until cooked through.
4. Cool the chicken in the refrigerator.
5. Toss cooled chicken with coriander, toasted sesame seeds, and scallions.
6. Toss with sesame dressing.
7. Serve over a bed of shredded lettuce.
